message.content:
@startuml
participant Cache
participant DiskLruCache
participant JournalFile
participant "DiskLruCache.Entry" as DiskLruCacheEntry
participant LinkedHashMap
participant Snapshot
participant "Cache.Entry" as CacheEntry
participant Response
participant CacheResponseBody

Cache -> DiskLruCache : get()
DiskLruCache -> DiskLruCache : initialize
DiskLruCache -> JournalFile : read
JournalFile -> DiskLruCacheEntry : 
DiskLruCacheEntry --> DiskLruCache : 
DiskLruCache -> LinkedHashMap : put()
DiskLruCache -> LinkedHashMap : get()
LinkedHashMap -> DiskLruCacheEntry : 
DiskLruCacheEntry --> DiskLruCache : 
DiskLruCache -> Snapshot : 
Snapshot --> Cache : 
Cache -> CacheEntry : response()
CacheEntry -> Response : 
Response -> CacheResponseBody : 
CacheResponseBody --> Cache : 
@enduml
